scripts.build: npm run build:brand && npm run build:crm && npm run merge
scripts.build:crm: cd apps/crm && CRM_PUBLIC_PATH=/crm/ npm run web:build
scripts.merge: mkdir -p dist && cp -r apps/brand-site/dist/. dist/ && mkdir -p dist/crm && cp -r apps/crm/web-build/. dist/crm/ && cp -r apps/crm/public/. dist/crm/
scripts.install:all: cd apps/brand-site && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../crm && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
